cards.back: A subset of Artificial Intelligence which enables systems to learn from data without being explicitly programmed

cards.front: What is the main goal of Machine Learning?
cards.back: To enable systems to make accurate predictions or decisions based on data, without being explicitly programmed

cards.front: What type of problems are typically solved using Machine Learning?
cards.back: Classification, Regression, Clustering, Recommendation, and Detection problems
A type of Machine Learning where the system is trained on labeled data to learn a mapping between inputs and outputs

cards.front: What is the difference between Supervised and Unsupervised Learning?
cards.back: Supervised Learning: System is trained on labeled data, Unsupervised Learning: System is trained on unlabeled data
